-- 2 of 17 --

Fundamental Truth:
Money actually 	IS 	life!
Time = Money
Money = Life

-- 3 of 17 --



-- 4 of 17 --



-- 5 of 17 --

2. Create “Caples Checklists”
3. Put successful promotions under
the microscope
4. Practice persuasion
5. Practice excellence
6. Practice critical thinking
7. View the world as a marketer
THINK!

-- 6 of 17 --

Learn from the best online
 	Gary Bencivenga
 	Gary Halbert
 	MakepeaceTotalPackage.com
 	Ben Settle
 	John Carlton
 	John Forde
 	Frank Kern

-- 7 of 17 --

Beating Intimidation
Remember:
1. Each company you talk to needs you more
than you need them.
2. You bring something unique to this that
nobody else can.
3. Rejection isn’t fatal — unless you let it be.
4. Feel the fear or intimidation; acknowledge it;
then move ahead.

-- 8 of 17 --



-- 9 of 17 --

Beat Procrastination — TODAY!
1. “Thousand Mile” mindset.
2. Don’t work. Play.
3. Discover the art of “creative procrastination.”
4. Work like you only have half a brain.
5. Listen to your “inner adult.”

-- 10 of 17 --



-- 11 of 17 --

Boost Your Creativity!
1. Metaphors and Similes:
“What is this like?
2. The soul of creativity:
Connectivity
3. Waste time willingly —
explore every viable path

-- 12 of 17 --



-- 13 of 17 --



-- 14 of 17 --

Beat Depression
1. Examine your “belief
filters”
 Nearly all events are
neutral
 We see them through
“belief filters”
 These filters trigger
thoughts about each event
 Thoughts trigger emotions
 Emotions can be either
empowering or debilitating

-- 15 of 17 --

Three exercises that help me:
 Backtrack: “Where did this
feeling come from?”
 Emotional retrogression:
Examine your belief filters.
The vast majority are simply
not valid.
 “What then?” exercise:
Follow the logical chain of
events to their ultimate
conclusion.

-- 16 of 17 --

Odds and Ends
 Silencing your inner adult
 Silencing your inner child
 Pioneering mentality —
what’s over the next
mountain?
 Mind-altering substances
 Never stop thinking — or
suggesting
 Stay hungry; fantasize
success; dream!

-- 17 of 17 --
